__fixture__.name: safe_mode_crash_loop_entry
__fixture__.scenario: Supervisor observed a crash loop within the strike budget and entered safe mode with a pre-entry checkpoint pinned. Authored files, trust, credentials, managed policy, and session-restore state stay untouched; extension auto-activation, extension host launch, session auto-reopen, remote helper attach, AI runtime access, and background rebuild are all suspended.

title: Safe mode on crash-loop entry
summary: Supervisor-entered safe mode after repeated startup failures, with a pinned pre-entry checkpoint so the rung can exit via checkpoint_restore.
preconditions: Supervisor observed repeated_startup_failure or crash_loop_detected within the bounded strike budget on shell_interaction_core or extension_and_tool_hosts.
A pre-entry checkpoint exists and is pinned in the support-bundle recovery_context so the rung can exit via checkpoint_restore without hunting for state later.

linkage_bindings.notes: Bundle exports produced from this rung pin current_rung_class = safe_mode and record rung_history entries with the matching checkpoint_ref.
Escalation handoffs carry recovery_rung_class = safe_mode and cite the rung's repair_transaction_ref and checkpoint_ref.
Doctor findings that drive crash-loop safe-mode entry quote this recovery_action_id rather than free-text advice.
checkpoint_restore is the reversal class, so the schema requires a checkpoint_ref linkage.
The repair-preview transaction that wrote the checkpoint binds here.

explanation_fields.preserved_work_summary: Authored files, open buffers, durable workspace indexes, trust posture, credentials, managed policy, and the session-restore store all remain untouched.
explanation_fields.disabled_capability_summary: Extension auto-activation, the extension host itself, session auto-reopen, remote helper attach, AI runtime access, and background rebuild stay suspended until the user widens out of safe mode.
explanation_fields.escalation_summary: Escalate when safe mode has been re-entered within its strike budget, when the user declines the next rung, or when Doctor confidence remains unknown_requires_probe after the diagnosis window.
explanation_fields.user_facing_next_step: Review the pinned pre-entry checkpoint, then choose widen-with-review or export a recovery-follow-up handoff packet.
